checks.name: single_csv_deliverable
checks.basis: Original Galaxy outputs are three TSV files rather than a single prompt-shaped CSV.

checks.name: required_columns
checks.basis: Original Galaxy outputs expose `category` and enrichment fields, not the required pathway-plus-three-pvalue columns.

prompt_result_evaluation.notes: The original Galaxy outputs do not directly satisfy the prompt-shaped deliverable.

checks.name: single_csv_deliverable
checks.basis: The helper file is a single CSV.

transformed_prompt_result_evaluation.notes: The helper CSV is a deterministic join across the preserved original Galaxy goseq outputs.

transformed_ground_truth_result_evaluati.comparison_rule: Row-level pathway-code match plus p-value absolute-difference tolerance <= 0.1 for each branch.

agent_performance_in_galaxy_score.notes: Score derived from preserved history containing failed intermediate jobs before successful completion.

calculation_notes: This run resumed a preserved live Galaxy history instead of launching new jobs.
Original Galaxy outputs are preserved unchanged under results/original_galaxy_outputs/.
The prompt-shaped helper CSV is derived only by deterministic joining on KEGG category code.
